finding_results.notes: Replaced four clipped diagnostic prompts with two run-on turns where Derry processes aloud through self-correction, trailing qualifications, and aborted clauses. He still lands the essential facts (two voices, assassin classification, opposed types) but arrives through frightened overtalk rather than a clean question ladder. Maren's single terse response preserved. Pack-strap business integrated into the speech rhythm rather than separated into its own beat.

summary: One finding addressed. Derry's debrief exchange collapsed from a four-prompt staircase into two messy processing turns with self-correction, run-on connectors, and a trailing question that undercuts itself. The passage now reads as stressed Derry rather than generic witness debriefing.
